headline: Claude Mythos Is Finding Real Security Vulnerabilities in Hospital Systems
body: Anthropic's newest reasoning model, Claude Mythos, has been deployed through Project Glasswing to identify zero-day vulnerabilities across major healthcare IT infrastructure. In its first 30 days, the model flagged 47 previously unknown security gaps in EHR systems, medical device firmware, and hospital network configurations. Three of the vulnerabilities were rated critical by CISA, affecting systems used by over 200 U.S. health systems. The findings underscore a growing reality: AI-powered security auditing is no longer experimental. CISOs who haven't evaluated autonomous vulnerability scanning for their clinical environments are already behind.
